channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tragedy as Two Die in Logan House Fire
item.description: A deadly house fire in Logan, Queensland, has claimed the lives of two people, prompting an ongoing police investigation. The incident, which occurred on July 22, 2026, has left the local community re...

item.title: Lions navigate selection challenges ahead of crucial Currie Cup clashes and All Blacks showdown
item.description: The Lions rugby team is grappling with the challenge of selecting players for their Currie Cup matches while preparing for a high-profile clash against the All Blacks. With a young squad, the franchis...

item.title: Top 5 Iconic World Trails for Thrill-Seekers
item.description: This article highlights five globally renowned hiking trails that cater to adventure enthusiasts. The Inca Trail in Peru offers a 2-4 day trek to Machu Picchu, requiring advance bookings and preparati...

item.title: Rahul's Protest Sparks AAP Jibe, CJP Focuses on Jantar Mantar
item.description: The article discusses the political tensions between the Congress party, the CJP (Congress of India Party), and the AAP (Aam Aadmi Party) following Rahul Gandhi's protest against the education ministe...

item.title: France to ban social media for children under 15
item.description: France's parliament has approved a landmark bill banning social media access for children under 15, making the country the first in Europe to implement such a measure. President Emmanuel Macron has po...

item.title: Jen Psaki Highlights Allegations Against Trump-Backed Arizona Congressional Candidate Mark Lamb
item.description: MS NOW host Jen Psaki discussed allegations involving Mark Lamb, the former Pinal County sheriff who is running for Congress in Arizona with President Donald Trump's endorsement. During her program, P...

item.title: Tanzania Needs to Shift Focus from Wealth Preservation to Creation in Capital Markets
item.description: The article emphasizes the need for Tanzania to transition its focus from wealth preservation to wealth creation through capital markets to accelerate economic development and achieve Vision 2050 goal...

item.title: Phinomics Advances Cancer Research with EccDNA Analysis in Berlin
item.description: Phinomics, a U.S. biotech company, has established its European hub at Bayer Co.Lab Berlin, focusing on extrachromosomal DNA (eccDNA) research to revolutionize cancer biology. The company's technology...

item.title: Sean McCann to compete in Commonwealth Games amid family's search for missing sister
item.description: Sean McCann, the brother of missing person Madeleine McCann, has been selected to represent Scotland in swimming at the upcoming Commonwealth Games in Glasgow. The 21-year-old student aims to secure a...

item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. summoned Chinese Ambassador Jing Quan to Malacañang following a violent confrontation between Filipino soldiers and Chinese Coast Guard (CCG) personnel at Ayungin Shoal ...

item.title: Finance Minister Requests $10 Billion Stabilization Facility from US for Economic Recovery
item.description: Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb has formally requested the U.S. Treasury to provide Pakistan with a $10 billion Exchange Stabilisation Support Facility (ESSF) to address economic challenges. The p...

item.title: US Navy Leverages Predictive Maintenance and AI to Boost Fleet Readiness
item.description: The U.S. Navy is collaborating with Air and Fathom5 to modernize its maintenance and repair systems through an integrated platform combining enterprise logistics software with artificial intelligence....

item.description: The Supreme Court of India has seen another judge step down from a critical case involving the bail plea of a high-profile individual, Gadling. Justice XYZ, who was initially assigned to the case, has...

item.title: Edmonton Downtown Restaurants Face Closure Due to City Planning and Construction Challenges
item.description: At least six downtown Edmonton restaurants have closed since June, with owners citing years of construction projects, poor planning, and declining foot traffic as key factors. Maheik Bhasin, former op...

item.title: Methane Explosion in Sikkim Tunnel Claims 12 Lives, 13 Still Missing
item.description: A suspected methane gas explosion triggered a tunnel collapse in Sikkim's Namchi district, trapping 25 workers. As of Tuesday, 12 bodies have been recovered, with 13 still missing. The incident occurr...

item.title: Minister Umahi Requests Transfer Of Habila Death Investigation To Abuja Amid Political Tensions

item.description: Electricity and Energy Deputy Minister Alexandra Abrahams engaged with the University of Cape Town’s Power Futures Lab to assess South Africa’s electricity sector and identify pathways for long-term s...

item.title: Serbian Entrepreneur Survives Near-Disaster on Ryanair Flight, Credits Luck and Passenger Aid
item.description: Ljubisa Karović, a 61-year-old Serbian entrepreneur, survived a harrowing incident on a Ryanair flight from Greece to Germany. The incident occurred when a window shattered mid-flight, nearly sucking ...

item.title: Master Hanz Cua's Analysis of Feng Shui Trends for July 22, 2026
item.description: The article discusses Feng Shui predictions by Master Hanz Cua for July 22, 2026, focusing on energy flows and auspicious directions. It highlights how specific dates and times can influence personal ...
